snippet.title: Qucee: "Kosso, je bent niet eens breed" | SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE ft. Kosso
snippet.description:
ABONNEER op Supergaande als je altijd op de hoogte wilt blijven!
https://Supergaande.lnk.to/abonneer

Bekijk meer van SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ShM8bOZM2Uk&list=PLlxjiU7Uh8S7BPPKCIFW2qO1wr4tI_KzJ

In Supergaande Freestyle strijden Qucee, Nesim, Ta Joela en een gast om wie het creatiefste is met bars. De groep spelen om de kroon in twee rondes: Switch Up en Freestyle.

In Switch Up wordt er een kaart gepakt waarop de lyrics staan van een bekend nummer. Fraasie draait een beat waarop het nummer gebracht moet worden. De rest van de groep moet vervolgens raden om welke track het gaat.

In de final round gaat de groep in Freestyle op basis van een woord zolang mogelijk proberen rappen. De eerste die choked, is eruit.

-----------

Meer video's
STRAATINTERVIEWS: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/Straatinterviews
TALKSHOWS: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/Talkshow
ACCEPTEER DE PUNCHLINE: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/AccepteerDePunchline
HET RAD VAN SUPERGAANDE: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/RadvanSupergaande
FOUTE MATTIES: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/FouteMatties
----------

Volg @SUPERGAANDE voor meer updates
Instagram: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/Instagram

Facebook: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/Facebook

snippet.title: Camdaki Kƒ±z | 1. B√ґl√Љm
snippet.description:
Camdaki Kƒ±z 1. B√ґl√Љm 

8 Nisan Per≈Яembe

T√Љrkiye'nin en b√Љy√Љk oteller zinciri olan KoroƒЯlu'nun ≈Яirketinde mimar olarak √Іalƒ±≈Яan Nalan, yumu≈Яak huylu, zeki, sƒ±cakkanlƒ± ve d√Љnyalar g√Љzeli bir gen√І kadƒ±ndƒ±r. Ailesinin tek √ІocuƒЯudur. Hayatƒ±nƒ± varlƒ±k, ilgi, alaka i√Іinde ge√Іirmi≈Я, en iyi okullardan dereceyle mezun olmu≈Я olan Nalan'ƒ±n, herkesten sakladƒ±ƒЯƒ± bir sƒ±rrƒ± vardƒ±r...

DiƒЯer yandan Nalan'ƒ±n √Іalƒ±≈Яtƒ±ƒЯƒ± ≈Яirketin gen√І veliahtƒ± Sedat, kendisinden ya≈Я√Іa b√Љy√Љk ve evli bir kadƒ±n olan, sosyetik g√Љzel Cana ile uzun yƒ±llardƒ±r yasak bir ili≈Яki ya≈Яamaktadƒ±r. ≈Юirketin sahibi ve Sedat'ƒ±n babasƒ± olan Rafet KoroƒЯlu, yƒ±llarca didinip kurduƒЯu KoroƒЯlu imparatorluƒЯunun itibarƒ±nƒ±n, ≈Яƒ±marƒ±k oƒЯlu Sedat tarafƒ±ndan lekelenmesine izin vermeyecektir. Rafet, Sedat'ƒ± Cana'dan ayƒ±rmak i√Іin, onu zorla ba≈Яka biriyle evlendirmeye karar verir.

snippet.title: Het beste van Wesley Sonck en Pedro Elias in De Container Cup: week #1
snippet.description:
Het hilarisch duo Wesley Sonck en Pedro Elias zijn weer van de partij in het tweede seizoen van De Container Cup. Bekijk hier de beste fragmenten uit week 1.

вЦґ KIJK online naar volledige afleveringen: https://www.goplay.be/вАЛ

вЦґ ABONNEER je op GoPlay en klik op de bel om meteen op de hoogte te zijn van nieuwe videoвАЩs: https://www.bit.ly/GoPlayopYouTubeвАЛ

вЦґ VOLG De Container Cup op social media!
Facebook Play4: https://www.facebook.com/play4be/вАЛвАЛ 
Instagram Play4: https://www.instagram.com/play4_be/вАЛвАЛ 
Twitter Play4: https://twitter.com/play4_beвАЛ

Instagram Pedro Elias: https://www.instagram.com/pedro_elias_elias/
Instagram Wesley Sonck: https://www.instagram.com/sonckwesley/

вЦґ OVER De Container Cup:
30 Belgische topatleten en 10 Bekende Vlamingen nemen het dagelijks tegen elkaar op in een even hero√ѓsche als unieke zevenkamp.

Atleten die van maandag tot woensdag het duel aangaan in het tweede seizoen van De Container Cup: Tim Declercq (wielrennen), Lize Broekx (kajak), Louis Croenen (zwemmen), Loena Hendrickx (kunstschaatsen), Lianne Tan (badminton), Jean-Marc Mwema (basketbal), Lotte Kopecky (wielrennen), Ewoud Vromant (wielrennen), Maxime вАШMadmaxвАЩ Blieck (breaking), Luka Van Den Keybus (turnen), Thierry Neuville (rally), Jorre Verstraeten (judo), Luca Brecel (snooker), Pauline Couckuyt (atletiek), Isaac Kimeli (atletiek), Gillian Benoy (rugby), Ceylin Alvarado (veldrijden), Marten Van Riel (triatlon), Jos Verlooy (paardrijden), Ryad Merhy (boksen), Nele Gilis (squash), Alexander Hendrickx (hockey), Thomas Pieters (golf), Ward Lemmelijn (roeien), Jasper Philipsen (wielrennen), Stoffel Vandoorne (Formule E), Julie Allemand (basketbal), Jarni Amorgaste (korfbal), Hendrik Tuerlinckx (volleybal) en Delfine Persoon (boksen).

Elke donderdag komen twee BV's tegen elkaar uit in een sportief duel. Zo staan de kroonprinsen van twee realityfamilies tegenover elkaar, vechten twee politieke zwaargewichten hun geschillen uit in de container, laten twee Voices van Vlaanderen van zich horen en strijden twee Olympische Kampioenen voor Container Cup-goud: Viktor Verhulst vs. Francesco Planckaert, Bart De Wever vs. Georges-Louis Bouchez
Helmut Lotti vs. Natalia en Tia Hellebaut vs. Kim Gevaert.

#DeContainerCup #PedroElias #WesleySonckвАЛ #Play4вАЛ #GoPlay

Alsof de hoogtevrees en trillende beentjes nog niet erg genoeg waren, krijgen de meiden √≥√≥k nog alle drie een handicap. De √©√©n nog erger dan de ander. Weet Jane ondanks het samenspannen te winnen van Marie of Laurie, of draait dit uit op √©√©n groot fiasco?

snippet.title: Uyanƒ±≈Я: B√Љy√Љk Sel√Іuklu 28. B√ґl√ЉmрЯПє
snippet.description:
Uyanƒ±≈Я: B√Љy√Љk Sel√Іuklu 28. B√ґl√Љm √Цzet:

Hasan Sabbah ve Batƒ±niler, Ba≈ЯuluвАЩyu tuzaƒЯa d√Љ≈Я√Љr√Љp onu ka√Іƒ±rmƒ±≈Яlar, √ґte yandan b√Љy√Љk bir kumpas kurup ≈ЮelemzarвАЩƒ± ele ge√Іirmeyi ba≈Яarmƒ±≈Яlardƒ±. DiƒЯer taraftan Sencer, Ba≈ЯuluвАЩnun ka√Іƒ±rƒ±ldƒ±ƒЯƒ±nƒ± ve LivyaвАЩnƒ±n yaralanmasƒ±na sebep olan ki≈Яinin Efruz olduƒЯunu ve EfruzвАЩun SabbahвАЩa √Іalƒ±≈Яan kƒ±demli bir Batƒ±ni olduƒЯunu √ґƒЯrenmi≈Яti. Ba≈ЯuluвАЩyu Batƒ±nilerin ka√Іƒ±rdƒ±ƒЯƒ±nƒ± anlayan Sencer, EfruzвАЩu yakalamak i√Іin ≈Юelemzar Dar√Љ≈Я≈Яifasƒ±вАШna doƒЯru yola koyulmu≈Яtu.
Ba≈ЯuluвАЩnun SabbahвАЩƒ±n elinde olduƒЯunu √ґƒЯrendiklerinde ≈ЮelemzarвАЩƒ± alamayacaklarƒ±nƒ± anlayƒ±p SabbahвАЩƒ±n Ba≈ЯuluвАЩyu serbest bƒ±rakmak i√Іin istediƒЯi NizarвАЩƒ±n HilatiвАЩni getirmeyi kabul etmek zorunda kalmƒ±≈Яlar ve Melik≈ЯahвАЩƒ±n huzuruna √Іƒ±kƒ±p bir bahaneyle NizarвАЩƒ±n HilatiвАЩni istemi≈Яlerdi.
Melik≈Яah, kƒ±sa bir s√Љre sonra Sencerlerin gizli y√Љr√Љtt√Љkleri bu harek√Ґtƒ± √ґƒЯrenmi≈Я ve NizarвАЩƒ±n HilatiвАЩni vererek; Sencerlerden gizli olarak SabbahвАЩa bir tuzak kurmu≈Я ve sƒ±rrƒ±n a≈Яik√Ґr olma vetiresini bu ≈Яekilde ba≈Яlatmƒ±≈Яtƒ±.
Melik≈ЯahвАЩƒ±n kurduƒЯu tuzaƒЯƒ±n neticesinde Sabbah hem hilatten hem de Ba≈ЯuluвАЩdan olmu≈Яtu. √З√Љnk√Љ Melik≈Яah, Ba≈ЯuluвАЩyu ≈ЮelemzarвАЩdan ka√Іƒ±rtmayƒ± ba≈Яarmƒ±≈Яtƒ±. Sencer, Nizam√Љlm√Љlk, Tapar ve Melik≈Яah saraya d√ґnm√Љ≈Яlerdi.
Ba≈Яulu, Melik≈ЯahвАЩƒ±n kar≈Яƒ±sƒ±na gelmi≈Яti. Ba≈Яulu mecbur kalƒ±p y√Љz√Љndeki pe√Іeyi indirince uzun yƒ±llar sonra ilk kez Ba≈Яulu ve Melik≈Яah, birbirlerinin y√Љz√Љn√Љ g√ґrm√Љ≈Яler ve sƒ±r a√Іƒ±lmƒ±≈Яtƒ±! Yƒ±llar √ґnce bu sƒ±rrƒ± tertipleyen ve Melik≈ЯahвАЩƒ±n tahta √Іƒ±kmasƒ±nƒ± saƒЯlayan Nizam√Љlm√Љlk, sultana yalan s√ґylediƒЯi i√Іin nasƒ±l bir h√Љk√Љmle kar≈Яƒ±la≈Яacaktƒ±r?
Melik≈Яah, yanƒ±na kadar y√Љkselip yine de kendisinden saklanan SencerвАЩi ve Melik≈ЯahвАЩƒ±n kendisini √ґld√Љ bilmesine tahamm√Љl edip saklanmayƒ± s√Љrd√Љren Ba≈ЯuluвАЩyu affedecek midir?
√Цte yandan sƒ±rrƒ±n a√Іƒ±lmasƒ± √Іok hƒ±zlƒ± bir ≈Яekilde t√Љm Sel√Іuklu hanedanƒ±na yayƒ±lacaktƒ±r. Sel√Іuklu Hanedanƒ± √Љyeleri Ba≈ЯuluвАЩnun ya≈Яadƒ±ƒЯƒ± ve SencerвАЩin gizli bir veliaht olarak ortaya √Іƒ±kmasƒ±nƒ± nasƒ±l kar≈Яƒ±layacaktƒ±r?
Sƒ±rrƒ± Melik≈ЯahвАЩtan daha √ґnce √ґƒЯrenen ve sƒ±rrƒ±n a√Іƒ±lmamasƒ± i√Іin Ba≈ЯuluвАЩnun kurtarƒ±lmasƒ±na mani olmak isteyen ve ba≈Яarƒ±lƒ± olamayan TerkenвАЩin Ba≈ЯuluвАЩya kar≈Яƒ± d√Љ≈Яmanca tavrƒ± eyleme d√ґn√Љ≈Яecek midir?

Thanks again for reading and have a day!!!

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her householdвАЩs most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular вАУ a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing вАЬappropriateвАЭ engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the QueenвАЩs deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack SnyderвАЩs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero whoвАЩs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), itвАЩs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thingвАЩs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√ґfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√Їl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

Aziz, ≈Яirketi kaybettiƒЯini √ґƒЯrenirse tepkisi ne olacaktƒ±r?T√Љrel Ailesi, MahurвАЩun sergisine gidecekleri sƒ±rada aldƒ±klarƒ± haberle MahurвАЩun hayatƒ±nƒ±n yine tehlikede olduƒЯunu √ґƒЯrenir. Mara≈Яlƒ± sergidekileri koruma altƒ±na alƒ±rken Nevzat bombayƒ± uzaktan patlatacak ki≈Яinin pe≈Яine d√Љ≈Яer. Olaylarƒ±n kontrolden √Іƒ±kmasƒ±yla g√ґzler Mara≈Яlƒ±вАЩya √Іevrilir. ar.title: ЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК ЎІўДЎ≠ўДўВЎ© 13
ar.description: ўКўДЎ™ўВўЙ ЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК ўИўЕЎІўЗўИЎ± Ў®ЎєЎѓ ЎЇўКЎІЎ® ЎЈўИўКўД, Ў™Ў≥Ў£ўД ўЕЎІўЗўИЎ± Ў£ўКўЖ ўГЎІўЖЎ™ ЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК ЎЈўИЎІўД ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўИўВЎ™ Ў®ЎєЎѓ Ў≠Ў≥ЎІЎ®ЎІЎ™ Ў®ўКўЖўЗўЕЎІ ўИЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК ўЕўЖЎ≤ЎєЎђ ўДЎ£ўЖ ўКЎѓўЗ Ў™ўДЎЈЎЃЎ™ Ў®ЎІўДЎѓўЕЎІЎ°. ўДўГўЖ Ў£Ў≥ЎІЎ≥ ўЕўИЎґўИЎє ўЕЎ≠ЎІЎ≥Ў®Ў™ўЗўЕЎІ ўДЎ®ЎєЎґўЗўЕЎІ ўЗўИ ЎєЎѓўЕ ўДўВЎІЎ°ўЗўЕЎІ. ўЕЎІўЗўИ ЎІўДўВЎ±ЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў≥ўКЎ™ЎЃЎ∞ўЗ ЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК Ў®ЎЃЎµўИЎµ ЎєўДЎІўВЎ™ўЗ ўЕЎє ўЕЎІўЗўИЎ±ЎЯ ўКЎЃЎ®Ў± Ў•ўДўЗЎІўЖ ўЖЎђЎІЎ™ўК Ў£ўЖўЗ ўЖўВўД ўЕўЕЎ™ўДўГЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎіЎ±ўГЎ© ўДЎіЎЃЎµ ЎҐЎЃЎ±, ўКЎЃЎ®Ў± ўЖЎђЎІЎ™ўК Ў•ўДўЗЎІўЖ Ў•ўЖўЗ ЎєўДўЙ ЎєЎ≤ўКЎ≤ Ў£ўЖ ўКЎєўДўЕ ўГўД ЎіўКЎ°, ўБўЗўД ўКўЕўДўГ Ў•ўДўЗЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎђЎ±Ў£Ў© ўИЎІўДўВўИЎ© Ў£ўЖ ўКЎЃЎ®Ў± ЎєЎ≤ўКЎ≤ Ў®ўГўД ЎіўКЎ°ЎЯ ўЕЎІўЗўК Ў±ЎѓЎ© ўБЎєўД ЎєЎ≤ўКЎ≤ ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ ўКЎєўДўЕ Ў£ўЖўЗ ЎЃЎ≥Ў± ЎІўДЎіЎ±ўГЎ©ЎЯ Ў™ЎѓЎ±ўГ ЎєЎІЎ¶ўДЎ© Ў™ўИЎ±ўКўД Ў£ЎЂўЖЎІЎ° Ў∞ўЗЎІЎ®ўЗЎІ Ў•ўДўЙ ўЕЎєЎ±Ўґ ўЕЎІўЗўИЎ± Ў£ўЖ Ў≠ўКЎІЎ© ўЕЎІўЗўИЎ± ўБўК ЎЃЎЈЎ±  Ў®ЎєЎѓ ЎІўДЎЃЎ®Ў± ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў™ўДўВўИўЗ. ўКЎ∞ўЗЎ® ЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДўЕЎєЎ±Ўґ ўДўДўИўВўИўБ ЎґЎѓ ЎІўДЎЃЎЈЎ± ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў≥ўКЎ≠ўД Ў®ўЕЎІўЗўИЎ±. ўКЎЃЎ®Ў±ўЗўЕ Ў®ўЗЎ±ЎІўЕ ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКўДЎІЎ≠ўВ Ў•ўДўЗЎІўЖ Ў•ўЖўЗ Ў•ўЖ ўДўЕ Ў™ўКЎ≥ўДўЕ ўЖўБЎ≥ўЗ ўБўК ЎЇЎґўИўЖ Ў≥ЎІЎєЎ™ўКўЖ Ў≥ўИўБ ўКўВЎ™ўД ўЕЎІўЗўИЎ± ўИЎђўЕўКЎє ўЕўЖ ўБўК ЎІўДўЕЎєЎ±Ўґ. ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ ўКЎґЎє ЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК ЎђўЕўКЎє ўЕўЖ ўБўК ЎІўДўЕЎєЎ±Ўґ Ў™Ў≠Ў™ Ў≠ўЕЎІўКЎ™ўЗ, ўКўДЎІЎ≠ўВ ўЖўИЎ≤Ў™ ЎІўДЎіЎЃЎµ ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў≥ўКўБЎђЎ± ЎІўДўВўЖЎ®ўДЎ© ўЕўЖ Ў®ЎєўКЎѓ, Ў™Ў™ЎђўЗ ЎІўДЎ£ўЖЎЄЎІЎ± ўЖЎ≠ўИ ЎІўДўЕЎ±ЎєЎіўДўК Ў®ЎєЎѓ ЎЃЎ±ўИЎђ ЎІўДЎ£ўЕўИЎ± ЎєўЖ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎЈЎ±Ў©, ўБўГўКўБ Ў≥ўКўЖўВЎ∞ Ў≠ўКЎІЎ© ўЕЎІўЗўИЎ± ўИЎІўДЎґўКўИўБ ЎІўДЎ™ўК ЎђЎІЎ°Ў™ Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДўЕЎєЎ±ЎґЎЯ

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Pedo-activist op de vlucht | DANNY'S WERELD #11
snippet.description:
In deze aflevering van Danny's wereld is Danny Ghosen pedoactivist Nelson M. achterna gereisd. Deze is Nederland ontvlucht om een aanhoudingsbevel te ontlopen en heeft politiek asiel aangevraagd in het land waar hij zich nu bevindt en naar eigen zeggen 'een relaxt leventje leidt.' Ghosen interviewde M. al in februari 2020 over zijn strijd om seks met kinderen legaal te maken. Het OM zegt vandaag dat Nelson M. internationaal geregistreerd staat en gearresteerd wordt zodra hij in beeld komt van justitie. 

Danny's wereld
In DannyвАЩs wereld gaat Danny Ghosen op zoek naar waar het wringt in onze maatschappij. Hij praat met mensen die moeilijk toegankelijk zijn en tot nu toe onzichtbaar waren voor het grote publiek, mensen die de grens opzoeken of daar overheen zijn gegaan of mensen die zich buitengesloten voelen. Danny komt overal binnen, vraagt door en oordeelt niet. Of het nou gaat om de nieuwste designerdrugs, slachtoffers van mensenhandel of verspreiders van nepnieuws.

Meer over DannyвАЩs wereld: https://www.vpro.nl/dannyswereld
Meer zien van Danny: https://www.npo.nl/danny

#vpro #dannyswereld

snippet.title: Grondig te werk met de Volvo FMX en FH5 van Van de Beeten... helemaal zand!
snippet.description:
Vandaag mogen we aan de bak met twee Volvo trucks, waarvoor geen klus te gek is! We trappen af met de FMX in Ottersum bij een enorme zandwinning! Na twee flinke scheppen van een mega bulldozer zitten we vol en rijden we gauw door naar Gennep. Hier zitten ze met smart op ons fijne zand te wachten, om er vervolgens mortel van te maken. Aan mij de taak om het zand vakkundig over te scheppen, keurig chauffeur! Terug in Veghel verruil ik de FMX voor de FH5 en gaan we door naar Boekel. Nadat ik de knoppen van de Palfinger-kraan heb bediend, mogen Sander en Xavier aan de slag om hun kraankunsten te vertonen... helemaal zand!

snippet.title: Het 10-minutengesprek | Sketch
snippet.description:
De ouders van Maartje krijgen te horen dat Maartje graag tekent tijdens het 10-minutengesprek. Denk jij dat Maartje talent heeft voor het tekenen van het menselijk lichaam?

Deze video komt uit de aflevering 'Medisch illustrator'.
Tekeningen van het menselijk lichaam worden gebruikt in lesboeken voor studenten maar ook om iets duidelijk te maken tijdens een doktersbezoek. Wanneer iemand ziek is, en lastige informatie krijgt van een dokter, is het fijn wanneer iets ook nog even wordt verduidelijkt door een plaatje. Deze tekeningen maakt Maartje, zij is medisch illustrator. Chirurg Dokter Visser ontdekt dat ware schoonheid van binnen zit.

Kijk de aflevering: klokhu.is/medischillustrator
Deze video heeft de kijkwijzer: alle leeftijden

#HetKlokhuis #10Minutengesprek #Tekenen #Talent #MedischeIllustratie #Klokhuis

Van koekjesfabriek tot golfslagbad, Het Klokhuis neemt je mee!

snippet.title: Dikke: вАЬIk ging je bijna klappenвАЭ | SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE ft. Dikke
snippet.description:
ABONNEER op Supergaande als je altijd op de hoogte wilt blijven!
https://Supergaande.lnk.to/abonneer

Bekijk meer van SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ShM8bOZM2Uk&list=PLlxjiU7Uh8S7BPPKCIFW2qO1wr4tI_KzJ

In Supergaande Freestyle strijden Qucee, Nesim, Ta Joela en een gast om wie het creatiefste is met bars. De groep spelen om de kroon in twee rondes: Switch Up en Freestyle.

In Switch Up wordt er een kaart gepakt waarop de lyrics staan van een bekend nummer. Fraasie draait een beat waarop het nummer gebracht moet worden. De rest van de groep moet vervolgens raden om welke track het gaat.

In de final round gaat de groep in Freestyle op basis van een woord zolang mogelijk proberen rappen. De eerste die choked, is eruit.

-----------

Bu vesileyle Turna, babasƒ± ƒ∞lteberвАЩin Batƒ±nilerce √ґld√Љr√Љld√ЉƒЯ√Љn√Љ √ґƒЯrenecek midir?
Sƒ±rrƒ± √ґƒЯrenen Hasan Sabbah, Ba≈ЯuluвАЩyu ka√Іƒ±rmayƒ± ba≈Яarmƒ±≈Яtƒ±. Sabbah, Ba≈ЯuluвАЩyu neden ka√Іƒ±rmƒ±≈Яtƒ±r? Onu tutsak ederek hangi emeline varmayƒ± planlamaktadƒ±r? Geri vermek i√Іin Ba≈ЯuluвАЩya kar≈Яƒ±lƒ±k SencerвАЩden hangi m√Љhim ≈Яeyi isteyecektir?
Tapar en sonunda emeline ula≈Яmƒ±≈Я ve emir olacaƒЯƒ±nƒ± √ґƒЯrenmi≈Яti. Sultan Melik≈Яah tarafƒ±ndan ≈Юelemzar Emiri tayin edilen TaparвАЩƒ± nasƒ±l bir s√Љrpriz beklemektedir?

snippet.title: Race Highlights | 2021 Rome E-Prix | Round 4
snippet.description:
Highlights from another classic ABB FIA Formula E World Championship race in Rome! With Nick Cassidy starting on pole for the first time in his brief Formula E career, could the Kiwi go on to claim his maiden victory? Find out here

Watch Formula E racing: http://www.FIAFormulaE.com/Watch
Subscribe for more ABB Formula E: http://bit.ly/2QwPZwC

#ChangeAccelerated

Race Tickets:
http://bit.ly/2BQtwTc
 
Like Us On Facebook: http://bit.ly/2KUMavM
Follow Us On Twitter: http://bit.ly/2APCvlP
Follow Us On Instagram: http://bit.ly/2APK1Nj
Watch our Instagram Stories: http://bit.ly/2UeiYo4
 
Welcome to the closest, most intense racing series on the planet. We bring unpredictable wheel-to-wheel combat to the city streets.
 
We race on the streets of the world's most progressive cities, in 5 continents. We take wheel-to-wheel racing to the streets. That means tighter turns, close combat and plenty of unforgiving concrete.
 
Formula E brings racing tech to the road. With major global car brands going head to head, Formula E is more than just a racing series - it's a battle for the future. Our cars, powered by pure electricity, pave the way for the cars of tomorrow.

The global electric street racing series.

snippet.title: Masumlar Apartmanƒ± 29. B√ґl√Љm
snippet.description:
Masumlar Apartmanƒ± 29. B√ґl√Љm √Цzeti:

NerimanвАЩƒ±n ka√Іma te≈Яebb√Љs√Љ ba≈Яta Han olmak √Љzere herkesi ≈Яoke etmi≈Яtir. Safiye tam bir kriz halindedir. Evde durumlar iyice gerilir. ƒ∞nciвАЩnin Neriman hakkƒ±nda √ґƒЯrendiƒЯi bir ger√Іek, olaylarƒ±n seyrini deƒЯi≈Яtirir ve Han duruma m√Љdahale eder. Neriman, her ≈Яeyden vazge√Іmi≈Я, hayatla baƒЯlarƒ±nƒ± koparmƒ±≈Я gibidir. #SAVIO #STUDIOSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. ItвАЩs the only channel where youвАЩll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. en.title: Putin's 'ghost army': investigating Wagner Russian mercenaries
en.description:
They train, fight and die in deep secrecy. Since 2012, from Ukraine to the Central African Republic, via Syria, Libya or Madagascar, Russian mercenaries from the Wagner group have been carrying arms in areas where Russia has officially sent no soldiers to fight. Here is our new video investigation.

Collected and analyzed by Le Monde and international investigators, documents shared online make it possible to follow the activity of some members of the Wagner group: fighting in Ukraine with the pro-Russian, in Syria with Bashar Al-Assad, in support of the forces of the Marshal Haftar in Libya, or protecting the President of the Central African Republic ...

This video investigationalso sheds light on some key figures in the organization and financing of Wagner mercenaries: from the group's godfather, the oligarch Yevgeny Prigojine, close to Vladimir Poutine, to Dimitri Sytyi, a young polyglot, parachuted manager of a mining company in the Central African Republic.

If you want to contact us or send us confidential tips, here is our mail: investigation@lemonde.fr

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвАЩve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that youвАЩre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвАЩve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnвАЩt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youвАЩre all the same
Because I hear heвАЩs got his arm вАШround a brand new girl
IвАЩve been picking up my heart
HeвАЩs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвАЩs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвАЩs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвАЩs really such a shame
ItвАЩs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвАЩm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвАЩll miss me
But by then youвАЩll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвАЩve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвАЩre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItвАЩs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItвАЩs a vicious cycle.

ўАўАўАўАўА
